description: Recto: Legal document. In Hebrew. Dating: No earlier than 15th century; mentions the currency muayyadi. This appears to be a rental contract for a portion of a store betwen Binyamin Romano and Faraj Allāh b. Shelomo. There are no witness signatures. Verso: Several lines of accounts in Judaeo-Arabic.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
